MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Kristen Doyan, Esq., Matern Law Group, PC (310) 531-1900 Attorney for Plaintiff Megan Speir, who is also present on her own behalf. (via ZOOM)
MELINDA S. RIECHERT, Esq., ORRICK, HERRINGTON & SUTCLIFFE LLP 650-614-7400 mriechert@orrick.com Attorneys for Defendant TWILIO INC. (via ZOOM)

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD as to Plaintiff Megan Spier is GRANTED.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TWILIO INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Defendant Twilio Inc.'s (Twilio) motion to compel arbitration is granted. The proceedings are stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration.

[SEE WORD MINTUES FOR FULL DETAILS]

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
